query: 华夏旗下本年以来收益率最高的前十只基金里，持仓贵州茅台最多的是哪只

args.sql: WITH latest_holding_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS latest_date FROM fund_holding), latest_size_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS latest_date FROM fund_size), huaxia_top10 AS (SELECT p.fund_code, p.fund_name, p.portfolio_return FROM fund_performance p JOIN fund_size s ON p.fund_code = s.fund_code AND s.date = (SELECT latest_date FROM latest_size_date) WHERE p.period = '本年以来' AND s.fund_company = '华夏基金' ORDER BY p.portfolio_return DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT h.fund_code AS '基金代码', top.fund_name AS '基金名称', ROUND(top.portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS '本年以来收益率(%)', h.holding_value AS '贵州茅台持仓市值' FROM huaxia_top10 top JOIN fund_holding h ON top.fund_code = h.fund_code AND h.date = (SELECT latest_date FROM latest_holding_date) WHERE h.stock_name = '贵州茅台' ORDER BY h.holding_value DESC LIMIT 1;

plan.rationale: 先从业绩表取本年以来收益率前十的华夏基金，再从持仓表找其中持有贵州茅台市值最高的基金。

notes: 使用 fund_size 最新日期确定基金归属华夏基金
业绩区间默认 '本年以来'
持仓日期使用 fund_holding 最新日期
先从业绩表取本年以来收益率前十的华夏基金，再从持仓表找其中持有贵州茅台市值最高的基金。
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。

metadata.sql: WITH latest_holding_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS latest_date FROM fund_holding), latest_size_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS latest_date FROM fund_size), huaxia_top10 AS (SELECT p.fund_code, p.fund_name, p.portfolio_return FROM fund_performance p JOIN fund_size s ON p.fund_code = s.fund_code AND s.date = (SELECT latest_date FROM latest_size_date) WHERE p.period = '本年以来' AND s.fund_company = '华夏基金' ORDER BY p.portfolio_return DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT h.fund_code AS '基金代码', top.fund_name AS '基金名称', ROUND(top.portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS '本年以来收益率(%)', h.holding_value AS '贵州茅台持仓市值' FROM huaxia_top10 top JOIN fund_holding h ON top.fund_code = h.fund_code AND h.date = (SELECT latest_date FROM latest_holding_date) WHERE h.stock_name = '贵州茅台' ORDER BY h.holding_value DESC LIMIT 1;

args.sql: WITH top10 AS (SELECT f.fund_code, f.fund_name, f.portfolio_return FROM fund_performance f WHERE f.period='本年以来' AND f.fund_code IN (SELECT DISTINCT s.fund_code FROM fund_size s WHERE s.fund_company='华夏') ORDER BY f.portfolio_return DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT t.fund_code AS 基金代码, t.fund_name AS 基金名称, ROUND(t.portfolio_return*100,2) AS 本年以来收益率, h.holding_value AS 持仓市值 FROM top10 t JOIN fund_holding h ON t.fund_code = h.fund_code WHERE h.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_holding) AND h.stock_name = '贵州茅台' ORDER BY h.holding_value DESC LIMIT 1

metadata.sql: WITH top10 AS (SELECT f.fund_code, f.fund_name, f.portfolio_return FROM fund_performance f WHERE f.period='本年以来' AND f.fund_code IN (SELECT DISTINCT s.fund_code FROM fund_size s WHERE s.fund_company='华夏') ORDER BY f.portfolio_return DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT t.fund_code AS 基金代码, t.fund_name AS 基金名称, ROUND(t.portfolio_return*100,2) AS 本年以来收益率, h.holding_value AS 持仓市值 FROM top10 t JOIN fund_holding h ON t.fund_code = h.fund_code WHERE h.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_holding) AND h.stock_name = '贵州茅台' ORDER BY h.holding_value DESC LIMIT 1

args.sql:
WITH latest_size_date AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_size
),
huaxia_funds AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT fund_code, fund_name FROM fund_size
    WHERE fund_company = '华夏基金' AND date = (SELECT max_date FROM latest_size_date)
),
top10 AS (
    SELECT fp.fund_code, fp.fund_name, fp.portfolio_return
    FROM fund_performance fp
    JOIN huaxia_funds hf ON fp.fund_code = hf.fund_code
    WHERE fp.period = '本年以来'
    ORDER BY fp.portfolio_return DESC
    LIMIT 10
),
latest_hold_date AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_holding
),
moutai_holdings AS (
    SELECT fh.fund_code, fh.stock_name, fh.holding_value, fh.holding_quantity, fh.nav_ratio
    FROM fund_holding fh
    JOIN top10 t ON fh.fund_code = t.fund_code
    WHERE fh.date = (SELECT max_date FROM latest_hold_date) AND fh.stock_name = '贵州茅台'
)
SELECT t.fund_code AS 基金代码, t.fund_name AS 基金名称, 
       ROUND(t.portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS 本年以来收益率,
       mh.holding_value AS 茅台持仓市值, mh.holding_quantity AS 茅台持仓数量, mh.nav_ratio AS 茅台占净值比
FROM top10 t
INNER JOIN moutai_holdings mh ON t.fund_code = mh.fund_code
ORDER BY mh.holding_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH latest_size_date AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_size
),
huaxia_funds AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT fund_code, fund_name FROM fund_size
    WHERE fund_company = '华夏基金' AND date = (SELECT max_date FROM latest_size_date)
),
top10 AS (
    SELECT fp.fund_code, fp.fund_name, fp.portfolio_return
    FROM fund_performance fp
    JOIN huaxia_funds hf ON fp.fund_code = hf.fund_code
    WHERE fp.period = '本年以来'
    ORDER BY fp.portfolio_return DESC
    LIMIT 10
),
latest_hold_date AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_holding
),
moutai_holdings AS (
    SELECT fh.fund_code, fh.stock_name, fh.holding_value, fh.holding_quantity, fh.nav_ratio
    FROM fund_holding fh
    JOIN top10 t ON fh.fund_code = t.fund_code
    WHERE fh.date = (SELECT max_date FROM latest_hold_date) AND fh.stock_name = '贵州茅台'
)
SELECT t.fund_code AS 基金代码, t.fund_name AS 基金名称, 
       ROUND(t.portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS 本年以来收益率,
       mh.holding_value AS 茅台持仓市值, mh.holding_quantity AS 茅台持仓数量, mh.nav_ratio AS 茅台占净值比
FROM top10 t
INNER JOIN moutai_holdings mh ON t.fund_code = mh.fund_code
ORDER BY mh.holding_value DESC
LIMIT 1;
